billing_paywall.softWarningTitle: Wax badan ayaad ka faa'iidaysanaysaa AskBiz
billing_paywall.softWarningBody: Waxaad isticmaashay {questionsUsed} oo ka mid ah {questionLimit} su'aalood ee bishii. Si cad ayaad qiime u heshay — fur wax badan si aadan waligaa u joojin badhtamaha falanqaynta.
billing_paywall.limitReachedTitle: Waxaad si buuxda uga faa'iidaysatay qorshahaaga bilaashka ah
billing_paywall.limitReachedBody: Waxaad isticmaashay dhammaan {questionLimit} su'aalood ee bilaashka ah ee bishaan. Kor u qaad si aad u sii wadato — xogtaada iyo wada-hadalladaada dhammaan waa la kaydiyay oo way sugayaan.
billing_paywall.featureLockedBody: {feature} wuxuu ku jiraa qorshaha Growth. Kor u qaad si aad u furto sirdoonka balaadhinta, isku-xirka tooska ah, digniinaha, saadaasha, iyo wax badan.
billing_paywall.featureLockedSecondary: Arag waxa kale ee lagu daray
billing_paywall.footer: Tijaabo bilaash ah 7-maalmood · Jooji goor kasta · Qiimaha waa la xayiray dadka hore u qaata
